entries.description: Worked on Quickbooks Online Payroll Team
highlights: Designed and Implemented an AI agent to help customers with general help and troubleshooting questions. Adopted by 100K customer in 1st month of launch.
Designed and implemented a modern pipenine to migrate Desktop Payroll customers to Online Payroll. Achieved a success rate of over 95% as compared to 55% on the legacy pipeline.
Automated the handling od MTD tax notice resolution for customers. Over 80% notices are processed and appropriate action taken within a minute of upload.

entries.description: Worked on the Orders and Return Management System
highlights: Designed and Implemented a feature to charge Return abuser customers a return fee per return. Brought down return percentage from abusive users came down from over 60% to less than 20%.
Designed and Implemented Open box delivery for low trust customers. This has prevented fraudulent behavior with yearly savings of over Rs 35 cr.
Designed and Implemented a price protection feature which resulted in reduction in returns/RTO from 41% to 36% of total items.
Designed and Implemented feature to incentivise Myntra Wallet adoption by giving instant refund. This increased wallet adoption by 220 bps.

entries.description: Worked on an industry leading Transportation  Management solution. The product helps clients manage transport throughout a global supply chain. Clients can optimize on costs, delivery time etc.
highlights: Developed a feature for multi-party billing, invoice/bill consolidation and adjustment post approval.
Developed a feature for sending tracking events on shipment groups. Events are applied to all eligible shipments in that particular shipment group after matching.

Developed a DB Migration Framework which allows developer to apply their db changes and run the scripts in
correct order.
